englishDefinitions: Used when something expected is about to happen or be said.
Often said with humor, annoyance, or anticipation before a familiar reaction, joke, problem, or event.
persianTranslation: الان همان چیزی که انتظارش را داشتیم اتفاق می‌افتد
examples: Oh, here it comes: Dad is going to tell the same story again.
She saw his angry face and thought, oh, here it comes.
When the lights went out, everyone said, "Oh, here it comes," expecting the storm.
